name: Statuspage
description: Statuspage by Atlassian provides public and private status pages for communicating real-time service availability. Manage incidents, update component statuses, and notify subscribers when issues arise or are resolved.

capabilities.name: list_pages
capabilities.description: List all status pages in your organization, including their name, URL, and branding configuration.

capabilities.name: list_components
capabilities.description: List all components on a status page. Components represent individual services or systems whose status is tracked independently.

capabilities.name: update_component_status
capabilities.description: Update the operational status of a specific component (operational, degraded_performance, partial_outage, major_outage, under_maintenance).

capabilities.name: list_incidents
capabilities.description: List all incidents on a status page, including their current status, affected components, and update history.

capabilities.name: create_incident
capabilities.description: Create a new incident on a status page to communicate an ongoing issue. Specify affected components, severity, and an initial status update message.

capabilities.name: update_incident
capabilities.description: Update an existing incident with a new status, message, or affected component changes. Use this to post progress updates or resolve incidents.

capabilities.name: list_subscribers
capabilities.description: List all subscribers to a status page who receive notifications about incidents and maintenance events.
